contentTypes.label: Event
contentTypes.editorialNeed: Editors can create calendar entries with date, venue, audience, registration, image, and publication status.

contentTypes.label: Class
contentTypes.editorialNeed: Editors can maintain class catalog entries and listing filters.

contentTypes.label: Person
contentTypes.editorialNeed: Editors can maintain staff and teaching artist profiles.

contentTypes.label: Landing page
contentTypes.editorialNeed: Editors can own homepage, visit, donate, and program landing content.

views.purpose: Public event listing with date sort and audience/program filters.
Public class listing with program and age/audience filters.

mediaStrategy: Use Drupal Media Library for owner-approved images and documents. Use explicit placeholders until approval.
claimBoundary: Fictional example only. Not launch evidence.
